content.verdict: For Fitness & Gym Staffing businesses, Workforce OS is purpose-built with automated crew dispatch, agency elimination, and industry-specific compliance tracking. Generic tools like Deputy and When I Work work for retail/office but lack the features Fitness & Gym Staffing companies need to save 60% on staffing costs.
